type_rationale: Long-form normative argument with multi-part scaffold.
decomposition_strategy: Master thesis up top; seven cardinal sub-claims as pillars; foundational premises at base.
scratch_outline: Master thesis: liberty depends on procedure, not outcome.
Pillar each: speech, assembly, due process, property, suffrage, redress, contract.
mece_check: Seven pillars are the standard cardinal liberties; non-overlapping by construction.
title: liberty

roof.label: Procedural liberty
roof.summary: Liberty is a property of procedure, not outcomes.

notes_on_fit: Cardinal-liberties scaffold maps to the seven-pillar form.
